content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Donut Shops". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1373/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of donuts that must be bought.

solution.approach: Use the ceiling division formula to calculate the minimum number of donuts that must be bought.

code.Python3:
import math
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    n, k = map(int, input().split())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    sum = 0
    for i in range(n):
        sum += math.ceil(a[i] / k)
    print(sum)
